description: Locked protocol version used by all Iteration 02 outputs
claim_limit: Does not imply an empirical result

description: Frozen study ISO2 code
claim_limit: Identifier only

description: Frozen ISO3 code
claim_limit: Identifier only

description: Frozen country display name
claim_limit: Label only

description: Membership in the 55-country mother frame
formula_or_construction: set to 1 for every output row
claim_limit: Does not indicate infrastructure observation

description: Current Phase 2-B primary infrastructure coverage flag
formula_or_construction: left join by country_code; preserve 0 and 1
claim_limit: 0 means Not observed under this source, not real-world absence

description: Membership in the separate longitudinal T31 core
formula_or_construction: 1 if country appears in either dyad endpoint; otherwise 0
claim_limit: Must not replace or be unioned with C39

description: OpenAlex period used for research activity
claim_limit: Descriptive period, not a causal pre-period

description: Primary national AI research activity indicator
formula_or_construction: sum of 1/m country contributions across included AI works
claim_limit: Publication activity only; not comprehensive AI capacity

description: Observation state for the Primary resource indicator
formula_or_construction: 0 -> Observed zero; >0 -> Observed positive; source unavailable -> Not observed
claim_limit: State is not a performance category

description: Layer-relative resource position used in the 55-country display
missing_rule: blank only if resource Not observed
claim_limit: Relative position, not a capacity score

description: Like-for-like resource position for C39 alignment diagnostics
claim_limit: Use only for common-sample descriptive alignment
implementation_note: Must be populated for C39 and blank outside C39

description: Locked resource sensitivity using raw AI work count
percentile_reference: ranked in A55 and C39 for sensitivity
claim_limit: Cannot replace fractional output after viewing results

description: A55 percentile for the AI-works sensitivity
missing_rule: blank only if sensitivity indicator Not observed
claim_limit: Supplementary sensitivity only

description: C39 percentile for the AI-works sensitivity
claim_limit: Supplementary sensitivity only
implementation_note: Must be populated for C39 and blank outside C39

description: PeeringDB snapshot date
claim_limit: Cross-sectional timestamp, not a pre-treatment date

description: Primary technical network position: incident sum of Phase 2-B inverse-ubiquity shared-ASN edge weights
formula_or_construction: sum over incident j of sum over shared ASN a of 1/(k_a-1)
missing_rule: blank outside C39; observed C39 zero remains 0
claim_limit: Public interconnection position; not traffic, bandwidth, latency or direct peering

description: Observation state for the Primary technical indicator
source_file: Derived from network_primary_covered and technical degree
formula_or_construction: coverage=0 -> Not observed; coverage=1 and degree=0 -> Observed zero; coverage=1 and degree>0 -> Observed positive
missing_rule: must be Not observed with blank numeric value outside C39
claim_limit: Not observed is never recoded to zero

description: Technical position percentile used both in the display and common-sample diagnostics
claim_limit: Layer-relative position only
implementation_note: Display and common-sample technical percentile are identical because both use C39

description: Incident sum of raw shared-ASN counts
formula_or_construction: sum over incident j of shared_asn_count_ij
missing_rule: blank outside C39; observed zero remains 0
claim_limit: Sensitivity only; does not replace inverse-ubiquity weighting

description: Number of PeeringDB IXP records assigned to the country
missing_rule: 0 may accompany Not observed and is not real-world absence
percentile_reference: not ranked for the Primary figure
claim_limit: Auxiliary description only

description: Unique status-ok member ASNs in the country IXP ecosystem
missing_rule: 0 may accompany Not observed and is not real-world absence
percentile_reference: not ranked for the Primary figure
claim_limit: Auxiliary exposure description only

description: Reason the Primary technical metric is unavailable
formula_or_construction: if coverage=0 copy coverage interpretation; else blank
claim_limit: Must state non-observation rather than absence
implementation_note: Required for all 16 non-covered countries and blank for C39

description: OpenAlex period used for knowledge collaboration
claim_limit: Descriptive period, not an outcome caused by the technical snapshot

description: Primary knowledge position: incident sum of fractional African coauthorship weights
formula_or_construction: sum over incident j of coauth_fractional_ij; reconcile to knowledge_strength_raw
claim_limit: Published coauthorship only; not all knowledge flows

description: Observation state for the Primary knowledge indicator
formula_or_construction: 0 -> Observed zero; >0 -> Observed positive; source unavailable -> Not observed
claim_limit: A knowledge isolate is observed zero, not missing

description: Layer-relative knowledge position used in the 55-country display
missing_rule: blank only if knowledge Not observed
claim_limit: Relative published-collaboration position only

description: Like-for-like knowledge position for C39 alignment diagnostics
claim_limit: Use only for common-sample descriptive alignment
implementation_note: Must be populated for C39 and blank outside C39

description: Number of African partners with positive fractional coauthorship
percentile_reference: not ranked for the Primary figure
claim_limit: Auxiliary breadth measure only

description: Signed technical-minus-knowledge percentile position gap
missing_rule: blank outside C39 or if either layer unavailable
claim_limit: Direction of relative position; not a deficit or causal effect
implementation_note: Must be populated for C39 and blank outside C39

description: Absolute technical–knowledge percentile position distance
missing_rule: blank outside C39 or if either layer unavailable
claim_limit: Descriptive position distance only
implementation_note: Must be populated for C39 and blank outside C39

description: Deterministic row order for the 55-country figure and gap table
formula_or_construction: descending research_activity_pct_layer55; exact ties by country_code ascending
claim_limit: Technology and knowledge values cannot break ties
